requirement: Submission must name the required source fields
review_action: Ask builder to define the input contract before implementation

requirement: Submission must define a stable dedupe or idempotency key
review_action: Block production writes until duplicate behavior is explicit

requirement: Retry policy must avoid rerunning the whole side-effect path blindly
review_action: Require bounded retry plus error ledger

requirement: Conflicts and uncertain rows must have a visible review queue
At least three reusable tests must be named
review_action: Ask for duplicate bad-payload timeout and conflict tests

requirement: AI or summary output must preserve source evidence
